text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, as I'm heading to the track<n>to do
training preparations...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Didn't get much<n>sleep? You're
the one who asked me to<n>train with you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I was up all night reading fan<n>letters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh, fan letters, huh? Did you get<n>anything out of
them?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...No. In fact, they left me feeling<n>puzzled.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I know fans are important and I really<n>appreciate
their support...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But I'm not sure what I can do in return...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I see... Let me ask you something,<n>Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Did any of the letters actually ask you to<n>do
something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... Well, I'm not sure exactly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I think you'd better take another, closer<n>look at
them.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you'll get it then.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, okay. I'll pay closer attention tothem. Thanks... Yawn.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Please do, but also make sure you get<n>enough
sleep. Your fans will be<n>disappointed if they see
you looking<n>sloppy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she sees Silence Suzuka stifle another<n>yawn, a
gentle smile spreads across Air<n>Groove's face.
